name: studio.update_page
description: Edit a single page's fields (title, slug, body). Does NOT publish; pair with studio.publish_page to ship the change.
whenToUse: Editorial update to an existing draft that will be reviewed before publish.
Automated content-ops edit (spelling fix, copy refresh) where the operator explicitly wants to leave publish for a separate approved step.
First half of an edit-then-publish sequence; follow up with studio.publish_page after review.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants atomic edit-and-publish — use studio.update_content (hero) instead; saves a round trip.
Page does not exist yet — call studio.create_page; update_page fails on unknown page_id.
Changing the slug without a studio.create_redirect for the old URL will break external links — plan the redirect first.
